name: Autumn Celebration Baskets
recipeInstructions:
On the first day of Fall, September 22, 1996, prepare baskets for Mom & Dad R. and Mom & Dad C., as well as bags for Granny & Grandpa, Aunt Lorraine & Uncle Bob, Aunt Candy & Uncle Bill, and Donna & Tom.
Print out 24 labels that say "Homemade Goodies" in black ink using a laser printer: 8 Apple Butter, 8 Pumpkin Bread, 4 Banana Bread, 4 Maple Fudge, and 4 plain. Use the TrueType Architect font with varying sizes for each label type.
Decorate specific labels with a "kitchen crock" stamp in black and a different bright color for each type of label. Decorate unspecified labels with a "crock border" stamp in black and dark blue.
Prepare 2 batches of Spiced Apple Butter according to the recipe, store them in canning jars as directed on the jar instructions, and attach Apple Butter labels to the jars.
Prepare Pumpkin Bread according to the recipe, using small disposable loaf pans instead of one large pan. Remove bread from pans, cool on wire racks, wrap tightly with plastic wrap, and attach Pumpkin Bread labels across the top of the wrapped bread.
Prepare Banana Bread according to the recipe, using four small disposable loaf pans. Cool the bread on wire racks, wrap tightly with plastic wrap, and attach Banana Bread labels across the top of the wrapped bread.
Prepare Maple Kisses according to the recipe, dividing the hot mixture among the remaining four small disposable pans. When fudge has cooled, remove it from the pans, wrap tightly with plastic wrap, and attach Maple Fudge labels across the top of the wrapped fudge.
Assemble one set of napkins, Apple Butter, Pumpkin Bread, Banana Bread, and Maple Fudge on a bed of tissue paper in each basket, weaving Autumn wreath decorations into the handles. Place a satin ribbon bow at the top of the baskets.
In each bag, combine one Pumpkin Bread, one Apple Butter, and two to three apple cider packets with tissue paper. Decorate the handles with satin ribbon and place a "crock border" sticker on the front of the bags.
You will have 2 of everything left: one for sampling and one for company or work.
